---
title: "Google fit exploration"
author: "Jonas Poppe"
format: html
editor: source
---


# Load Libraries

```{r}
#| echo: false

library(tidyverse)
library(targets)
library(ggpubr)
library(here)

```

# Load data
```{r}
tar_load(c(azm_daily, daily),
         store = here("_targets"))
```

# Exploration of daily data


```{r}
#| echo: FALSE


daily %>% 
  mutate(year = as.factor(year(date))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = weight_kg, y = azm_total)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = year), shape = 21) +
  geom_smooth() +
  theme_anthropic() +
  stat_cor() +
  scale_fill_health()+
  labs(y = "Active zone minutes (total)",
       x= "Weight (kg)")

```
